summary: Iteration 1 scoped as a pure UI/UX Redesign pass: bring 15 existing Flutter screens into visual alignment with rideglory.pen design. No new features, no backend changes, no new domain models. 11 user stories (US-1-1 through US-1-11) covering gap analysis, 9 screen modules, and a QA gate story. 10 tasks defined. Implementation split into 5 module-scoped PRs (max 40 files each). ManageAttendeesPage explicitly deferred to iter-2.

qualityGates.detail: docs/handoffs/po.md present with 11 user stories and 10 tasks
